ddls:
CREATE TABLE "benchmarking_tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "task_name" TEXT /* Name of the task (e.g., kr-vs-kp, breast-w) */,
  "task_type" TEXT /* Type of task (e.g., machine learning, data processing) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the task */,
  "input_parameters" TEXT /* JSON field to store input parameters for the task */,
  "output_metrics" TEXT /* JSON field to store output metrics for the task */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the task was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the task was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the task (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm (e.g., forester, h2o) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the algorithm */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the algorithm was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the algorithm was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "programming_languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each programming language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the programming language (e.g., Python, R) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the programming language */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the programming language was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the programming language was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benchmarking_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task the result belongs to */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm used in the result */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* ID of the programming language used in the result */,
  "forester_time" REAL /* Execution time of the forester algorithm */,
  "h2o_time" REAL /* Execution time of the h2o algorithm */,
  "difference" REAL /* Difference between the execution times */,
  "relative_diff" REAL /* Relative difference between the execution times */,
  "input_parameters" TEXT /* JSON field to store input parameters for the specific result */,
  "output_metrics" TEXT /* JSON field to store output metrics for the specific result */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the result was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the result was last updated */,
  "task_version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task version used */,
  "algorithm_version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm version used */,
  "language_version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the programming language version used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmarking_results_algorithm_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_version_id") REFERENCES algorithm_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmarking_results_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES benchmarking_tasks ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmarking_results_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmarking_results_task_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_version_id") REFERENCES task_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmarking_results_language_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_version_id") REFERENCES language_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmarking_results_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES programming_languages ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the task */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the version was last updated */,
  "input_parameters" TEXT /* JSON field to store input parameters for the specific version */,
  "output_metrics" TEXT /* JSON field to store output metrics for the specific version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_versions_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES benchmarking_tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the algorithm */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_versions_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "language_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* ID of the programming language the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the programming language */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_language_versions_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES programming_languages ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user was last updated */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON field to store user permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the result being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the result */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the result was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access event was logged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES benchmarking_results ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "custom_tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each custom task */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the task */,
  "task_name" TEXT /* Name of the custom task */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the custom task */,
  "input_parameters" TEXT /* JSON field to store input parameters for the custom task */,
  "output_metrics" TEXT /* JSON field to store output metrics for the custom task */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the custom task was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the custom task was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_custom_tasks_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the custom task the dataset belongs to */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the dataset was uploaded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the dataset was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES custom_tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the result the visualization is based on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the visualization */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., bar chart, line graph) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the visualization */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the visualization was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the visualization was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES benchmarking_results ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
